findings.title: CVE-2026-41940 — cPanel & WHM Authentication Bypass via CRLF Injection Used as 0-Day
findings.affected_technology: cPanel & WHM (all currently supported branches) and WP Squared 11.136.1
findings.summary: CRLF injection in cPanel/WHM login lets unauthenticated attackers plant arbitrary session properties (e.g. user=root) and seize the management plane; exploited as a 0-day, patched within hours of the 2026-04-29 advisory.

findings.title: Mini Shai-Hulud — SAP CAP npm Supply Chain Compromise with Claude Code SessionStart Persistence
findings.summary: TeamPCP-attributed worm published trojanised SAP CAP packages on 2026-04-29 that harvest GitHub/npm/cloud secrets and propagate by writing .claude/settings.json (abusing Claude Code SessionStart hook) and .vscode/tasks.json into every accessible repo; 1,000+ exfiltration repos already on GitHub.

findings.title: OpenEMR — 38 AISLE-Disclosed CVEs Including Unauth Patient Data Exfiltration (CVE-2026-24898)
findings.affected_technology: OpenEMR (open-source electronic medical records, ~100,000 healthcare-provider deployments)
findings.summary: AISLE's autonomous analyzer produced 38 CVE-tagged advisories against OpenEMR, including CVE-2026-24898 (unauth patient-identity disclosure on any internet-reachable instance) and a critical chain to full ePHI exfiltration plus RCE; all patched, public coverage 2026-04-28/29.

findings.title: Qinglong Task Scheduler CVE-2026-3965 / CVE-2026-4047 — Pre-Auth RCE Mass-Exploited for Cryptomining Since February
findings.summary: Two pre-auth bypass + RCE chains in Qinglong's Express.js URL routing (path-rewrite via /open/* and case-insensitive routing to /api/system/command-run) used in the wild since 2026-02 to deploy a cross-platform cryptominer (.fullgc); patch in 2.20.2 and PoC public on 2026-04-29.

noted.summary: Path traversal via ZIP extraction (CVSS 9.3) — adds to the running list of MCP server unauth-RCE patterns observed across Spring AI, nginx-ui, and chatgpt-mcp-server.
Command injection via Ollama model URL parameter (CVSS 8.7) — same unsanitised-input-to-child_process.exec pattern as FastGPT/Langflow.
Stored XSS to file exfiltration; niche document-portal scope but unauth-to-file-leak pairing is exploitable.
Broken Access Control on the config endpoint (separate from yesterday's CVE-2026-42208 SQLi); apply the nightly fix in concert with the SQLi patch.
Stored XSS in GitHub-hook-trigger validator; Overall/Read auth required, fixed in 1.46.0.1 — apply alongside the rest of the 2026-04-29 Jenkins advisory.
Email header injection (CVSS 8.5); risk for any deployer using Plunk for password-reset / OTP emails.
Unauthenticated SSRF (CVSS 7.5) — internal-network pivot from any internet-exposed Chamilo instance.
HTML injection in email templating; lower-severity than historical GoAnywhere chains but worth scheduling.
Embedded private X.509 TLS key shipped in the build artifacts; rotate certificates that depended on Cockpit-issued material.
Local privilege escalation; out of remote-services scope but PoC public — schedule a kernel update window for jump hosts and CI runners.
Critical (9.6 / 8.8) flaws in Turkish government Linux distro components; niche population, mention for distro-watchers.
Ukrainian police arrested three for hijacking 610,000 Roblox accounts and selling them for €225,000; consumer scope, useful as a credential-stuffing data point.

noted.product: Quick Page/Post Redirect WordPress plugin (70K+ installs)
noted.summary: BleepingComputer reports a five-year dormant backdoor; possibly an extension of the EssentialPlugin/Kris campaign covered 2026-04-17 — promote next cycle if confirmed as a separate plugin/family.
